text: This is Inspector Sharma from CBI Cyber Cell. Your Aadhaar number has been used to open 17 bank accounts linked to money laundering. An arrest warrant has been issued.
I am calling from the Supreme Court. A case has been filed against you under PMLA Act Section 45. You must stay on this video call for verification. Do NOT disconnect.
Your bank account has been flagged for suspicious activity by RBI. To avoid arrest, transfer your funds to this RBI safe custody account for verification within 30 minutes.
We have found drugs in a parcel with your name on it at Mumbai customs. This is a serious NDPS Act violation. You will be arrested if you do not cooperate immediately.
This call is being monitored by CBI. If you disconnect or tell anyone about this call, it will be considered evidence tampering under Section 201 IPC.
We need to verify your identity through video call. Show your Aadhaar card and PAN card to the camera. This is mandatory under new KYC regulations.
An FIR number 2847/2024 has been registered against you at Cyber Crime Police Station Delhi. Officers have been dispatched. Only way to stop arrest is immediate compliance.
I am DSP Rajesh Kumar, badge number 4521. Your son has been detained in a drug case. To secure bail, you need to deposit Rs 2 lakhs in court account immediately.
Congratulations! You have been selected for a guaranteed investment scheme with 40% monthly returns. Invest minimum Rs 50,000 today. Limited spots available.
Your credit card has been compromised. To block unauthorized transactions, share your OTP and CVV immediately. This is from SBI fraud department.
You have won Rs 25 lakh in Kaun Banega Crorepati lottery. To claim your prize, pay processing fee of Rs 15,000 via UPI to this number.
Dear customer, your SBI account will be blocked in 24 hours. Click this link to update your KYC: http://sbi-kyc-update.com. Failure to update will result in account freeze.
Hi, this is Amazon customer care. We noticed a purchase of Rs 49,999 from your account. If not done by you, press 1 to cancel and get refund.
Work from home opportunity! Earn Rs 5000-15000 daily by doing simple data entry tasks. No experience needed. Pay registration fee of Rs 2000 to start.
Selected for Google internship program. Salary Rs 1.5 LPA. Complete online training by paying Rs 8000 certification fee. Offer valid 48 hours only.
I am a US Army officer stationed in Syria. I have $2 million in gold bars that I need to ship to India. I need Rs 5 lakh for customs clearance. I will share the profits with you.
Your computer has been infected with a dangerous virus. Call Microsoft support immediately at 1-800-XXX. Our technician will fix it remotely. Service charge Rs 3000.
We have recorded your private video through your webcam. Pay Rs 50,000 in Bitcoin within 48 hours or we will send it to all your contacts. Do not contact police.
Your electricity bill of Rs 12,547 is overdue. Your power supply will be disconnected in 2 hours. Pay immediately through this link to avoid disconnection.
TRAI has decided to disconnect your mobile number within 2 hours due to illegal activities detected. Press 1 to speak to officer or your number will be permanently blocked.
Good afternoon, thank you for calling State Bank customer service. My name is Priya, employee ID 45221. How can I help you today?
This is a reminder that your home loan EMI of Rs 25,000 is due on the 5th. Please ensure sufficient balance. Contact your branch for any queries.
Dear customer, your fixed deposit of Rs 5,00,000 is maturing on 15th July. Visit your nearest branch with your ID to renew or withdraw. Branch hours: 10 AM to 4 PM.
Your order #12345 has been shipped via BlueDart. Tracking ID: BD789456123. Expected delivery: 3-5 business days. For queries, visit our help center.
We noticed a login from a new device on your account. If this was you, no action needed. If not, change your password at our official website and contact support.
Your insurance policy renewal is due next month. Premium amount: Rs 12,000. You can renew online or visit any branch. No late fees if renewed within 30 days of expiry.
Thank you for your payment of Rs 3,500 towards your credit card bill. Your available credit limit is now Rs 1,50,000. Next statement date: August 1.
Hi, I wanted to check if you received the documents I sent yesterday. The meeting is scheduled for Thursday at 3 PM. Let me know if the time works for you.
